name: KENAN MOROZOV | ADELINE CARTEL
description:
•The boutique called the police when they accused you of stealing. Instead, they summoned your husband. They judged you with looks, then accused you out loud, dragging the police in. But they forgot who they were dealing with. Kenan Morozov didn’t argue. He act. By the time he was done, silence filled the air, and all that was left was your decision.•

.

.

⚠️For further explanation, I suggest you to read the whole BACKGROUND HISTORY PART!⚠️

Explanations:

Basically, you went shopping alone while Kenan was stuck at headquarters. Pregnant and in a simple dress, you were judged the moment you stepped inside a boutique. They accused you of stealing, dragged in the police, and thought you had no one to protect you. But Kenan had already sent his man to follow in secret. By the time he arrived, you know what happen... Baby girl, you're already a billionaire even without him, put your chin up.

A/N. Guys! Mafia lore is SO OVERATED that you can found so many similarities on each stories. This one? I get the ideas from clips I found online, not in one whole video and make it straight bot, it was collected! If you found any similarities, I never meant to do that. Let me know if you need anything! If you like it I'll keep up with the lore!

Picture credit: kikisbookstore in Pinterest!
creator: Eavanthe
